title: Rich Clay Pot Vietnamese Chicken Pho-Ga
description: A sour, chewy, weeknight favorite featuring mozzarella and a clay-pot-cook dash-friendly method.
instructions: Combine fish sauce, lime juice, sugar, coriander seeds, and bird's eye chilies in a bowl, stirring to combine.
Grind garlic and lemongrass into a paste using a mortar and pestle.
Heat 2 cups of water in a clay pot or mini cocotte over medium-high heat.
Add chicken breasts and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and lemongrass paste, cooking for 1 minute.
Add rice noodles and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly tender.
Pour in chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and add mozzarella cheese, stirring to combine.
Continue to cook until cheese is melted and sauce is bubbly, about 3-4 minutes.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
Discard bay leaves and serve hot, garnished with lime wedges and fresh cilantro if desired.
